summary: Live PR inventory shard classified independently. No shared canonical exists, no security-sensitive items were detected, and no close/merge/fix action is safe or allowed for these open PRs.

actions.reason: Unique maintainer-owned tooling/test PR with substantive code and mixed checks; it is neither duplicate nor low-signal, and closure is not appropriate.
Focused Mattermost bug-fix PR with a failed proof gate and waiting-on-author status; it is not a duplicate or low-signal close candidate.
Substantive Discord session-state PR with proof/status still requiring normal maintainer review; no evidence supports duplicate, superseded, or low-signal closure.
Focused iOS PR appears ready for ordinary maintainer review, but this inventory job cannot merge or perform technical correctness judgment; no closure basis exists.
Focused Telegram message-delivery PR with a failed native proof gate and waiting-on-author status; it is not duplicate, superseded, or low-signal.
